title: Rail Lubricant
description: Apply some wax to your rails to speed up your minecarts!
body:
This mod is a solution to the slow speed that minecarts have without breaking redstone contraptions!

When a minecart is on a lubricated rail, its maximum speed is tripled!

You can lubricate any type of rail by surrounding a piece of honeycomb with the rail type you want to lubricate in the crafting table.

**Note:** Lubricated rails cannot turn due to the fact that turning with them would make the minecart fly off of the rail. Switch to regular rails to turn, then continue using lubricated rails.
